nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: Replace the woman's face and hair in Image1 with the woman's face and hair in Image2, without changing the clothing. Man roles and other places remain completely unchanged.Maintain consistent color tones for better integration of characters into the environment.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
cozy winter night inside a wooden cabin, a young woman sitting near a window with snowfall outside, extreme foreshortening perspective, her hand holding a small glowing candle extended toward the camera, the hand and candle dominating the foreground and appearing very large, fingers softly illuminated by warm candlelight, the rest of her body receding into the distance, dramatic perspective distortion, very low camera angle close to the candle, wide-angle lens (18mm), deep spatial composition, warm golden candle glow lighting her face softly in the background, wooden cabin interior, blankets and warm textures, cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, strong foreground-to-background depth, atmospheric winter mood, ultra detailed, masterpiece quality. candle extremely close to the camera, exaggerated perspective distortion, foreground object 3x larger than background

A Dark artistic logo in the upper center of the screen that reads'Dark Beast ZiT8 8Steps Restoring Diversity Simple Workflows' , 右下角精致极小字体标注“DarkBeastZ v8 Restoring Diversity @FOK:Semantic Directional Alignment”
